name: claude-prd
description: PRD authoring and story-by-story implementation workflow for Claude Code

plugins.name: prd
plugins.description: Create and work through Product Requirements Documents story-by-story. Provides /prd:create (interactive PRD authoring), /prd:work (subagent-driven implementation of one story per invocation), and /prd:review (parallel-subagent review of a branch against its PRD).
